query: SELECT id, tipoUltrassom, dataExame, idadeGestacional, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') as peso, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') as percentil FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 330019 ORDER BY dataExame;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT id, tipoUltrassom, dataExame, idadeGestacional, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') as peso, JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') as percentil FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 330019 ORDER BY dataExame;
